step.name: scope-token
step.action: Issue minimum-scope PAT or OAuth app; store in secrets manager.

step.name: implement-client
step.action: Implement Figma REST client with token-bucket rate limiter + retry-after handler.

step.name: run-operation
step.action: Execute operation; collect per-node results; aggregate into report.

step.name: emit-audit-log
step.action: Append JSONL audit entry; rotate daily.

step.name: publish-output
step.action: Upload to S3 / artefact store; notify caller via webhook.
